name: toolbar-3col-grid
description: Non-split toolbar (bt-toolbar) uses same 3-col grid as bt-toolbar__main: minmax(0,1fr) auto minmax(0,1fr). Left=actions, Center=connection+travel-indicator, Right=time-format+theme+settings. Mobile override reverts to display:flex.

name: toolbar-byteMetricsBadge-trailing
description: ToolbarPanel byteMetricsBadge prop: connectionBadge was split into a deprecated no-op prop (connectionBadge) and a new byteMetricsBadge prop rendered in bt-toolbar__main-trailing. Connection status badge removed entirely.

name: repl-panel-slot
description: BehaviourTreeDebugger accepts replPanel?: ReactNode slot; when set, a terminal toolbar button (bt-toolbar__repl-btn) appears that toggles replMode state, replacing the canvas area with the provided ReactNode. replMode and performanceMode are mutually exclusive — entering one clears the other.

name: repl-panel-prop-integration
description: replPanel prop integration: App.tsx passes ReplTerminal as replPanel prop to BehaviourTreeDebugger; use @ts-expect-error when the receiving package's types are not yet merged into the current branch

content: DEMO_PRIVATE_KEY in use-repl.ts must use seed 'bt-studio-demo-repl-key-v1------' (32 ASCII bytes) to match DEMO_SERVER_KEYPAIR in studio-plugins/src/repl-crypto.ts; any mismatch prevents out-of-box REPL
replTheme export: repl-theme.ts exports 'replTheme' (not ubuntuTheme) — Frida-style plain black (#0a0a0a bg), simple '> ' prompt, Menlo/Consolas font, no Ubuntu references

name: repl-tab-activity-guard
description: repl-tab-activity-guard: activity window overlay condition guards on !replMode (same as !performanceMode) — prevents overlay appearing on REPL tab; pattern: !performanceMode && !replMode && activityWindowEnabled && activityWindowVisible

name: toolbar-grid-auto-1fr-auto
description: Toolbar grid columns should be 'auto 1fr auto' not 'minmax(0,1fr) auto minmax(0,1fr)': actions column sizes to content (auto), center takes remaining space (1fr with min-width:0+overflow:hidden so travel indicator clips), trailing sizes to content (auto flex-shrink:0). Prevents TT chip expansion from compressing action buttons.

name: repl-e2e-test-structure
description: REPL e2e tests connect StudioAgent with ReplPlugin(serverPublicKey: DEMO_SERVER_KEYPAIR.publicKey), wait 200ms for handshake after isConnected, use trpc.repl.eval.mutate + trpc.repl.completions.mutate; tests fail pre-fix (plaintext broker) and pass post-fix (NaCl relay)

name: repl-ondata-vs-onkey
description: xterm.js term.onKey() fires on raw keydown BEFORE dead key/IME composition resolves; term.onData() fires after composition. For REPL terminals handling international keyboards, use onData for printable character input and onKey only for special keys (Enter, Backspace, arrows, Tab, Ctrl sequences). Filter onData: skip \r, \x7f, \x1b*, and chars < 0x20.

name: repl-keyboard-isolation
description: When BehaviourTreeDebugger has a global window keydown handler for shortcuts (Space/Arrow/Escape), it must early-return when replMode is active. Add replMode to the useEffect dependency array. Without this, time-travel shortcuts fire while the user types in the REPL terminal.

name: repl-cursor-tracking
description: cursorPosRef tracks cursor position in inputBufferRef; ArrowLeft writes \x1b[D, ArrowRight writes \x1b[C; redrawInputLine(term, text, cursorPos) positions cursor by writing \x1b[N D after prompt+text; Backspace and onData (mid-line insert) both use redrawInputLine; all operations keep cursorPos in sync

name: repl-ghost-textarea-css
description: xterm.js helper textarea may appear as ghost input at top of canvas if layout clips incorrectly; fix: inject <style> in JSX with .xterm-helper-textarea { opacity: 0 !important; left: -9999px !important; top: -9999px !important; }

name: repl-masked-privkey
description: KeyRow accepts masked prop; when masked && value.length > 4, displays value.slice(0,4)+'••••••'; title attr set to 'Private key (hidden)'; CopyButton still receives full unmasked value

name: repl-syntax-highlight-cursor-safe
description: highlightJs(text) wraps tokens in ANSI codes but returns same visible char count; redrawInputLine uses text.length (not highlighted.length) for cursor stepsBack so ArrowLeft/Right stay correct

name: repl-always-redraw-on-input
description: onData handler in ReplTerminal always calls redrawInputLine (never bare term.write(data)) so syntax highlighting stays consistent as token contexts change (e.g. typing a quote turns previous text into a string literal)

name: repl-arrow-redrawInputLine
description: ArrowLeft/Right handlers must call redrawInputLine() not term.write('\x1b[D'/'\x1b[C'). Direct escape writes caused visible arrow-char artifacts and unreliable cursor positioning. redrawInputLine fully redraws the input line, keeping xterm cursor in sync with cursorPosRef.

name: repl-ghost-textarea-css-in-head
description: xterm-helper-textarea CSS fix must be injected into document.head via createElement('style'), not as a JSX <style> element in the flex container. A <style> as a flex child can interfere with layout in some browsers. Inject in useEffect and remove in cleanup.

name: repl-autocomplete-navigation
description: hasSuggestions guard block must intercept ArrowUp/ArrowDown/Enter BEFORE history and eval handlers. Use redrawSuggestionsAndInput() (go up N+1 lines, erase, reprint list+prompt) when cycling; use clearSuggestionsAndRedraw() (go up N+1 lines, erase, reprint only prompt) on Escape/Enter-accept.

name: xterm-shadow-dom-style-filter
description: collectDebuggerStyles shadow DOM filter must include '.xterm' so xterm.css rules are copied into the shadow DOM; without it, the terminal renders unstyled inside BehaviourTreeDebugger

name: repl-writeln-eol
description:
repl-writeln-eol: writeln() normalizes embedded 
 to 
 via text.replace(/?
/g, '
') before appending 
. Fixes staircase indentation in multi-line REPL output (e.g. JSON.stringify results). Applied in packages/studio-ui/src/repl/ReplTerminal.tsx

name: repl-multiline-cursor-col-fix
description: repl-multiline-cursor-col-fix: cursor repositioning after multi-line redraw. After writing PROMPT+content and going up linesBelow rows, colNow=lastLineLen (or PROMPT_VISIBLE_LEN+lastLineLen for single-line). targetCol=(cursorLine===0 ? PROMPT_VISIBLE_LEN : 0)+charsBeforeCursorOnLine. movementLeft=colNow-targetCol; use \x1b[D/>0 or \x1b[C/<0. Naive 'go left by chars-after-cursor' over-moves on line 0 by PROMPT_VISIBLE_LEN.

name: repl-linesRenderedRef-reset
description: repl-linesRenderedRef-reset: linesRenderedRef must be reset to 1 on: Enter submit, Ctrl+C, clearSuggestionsAndRedraw, redrawSuggestionsAndInput. After term.clear() (Ctrl+L) also reset to 1 before calling redraw. Forgetting to reset causes next redrawInputLine to go up stale number of lines into previous output.

name: repl-local-echo-integration
description: xterm-readline integration: (1) loadAddon then override attachCustomKeyEventHandler for Tab (return false + async handleTab) and Shift+Enter (term.input('\x1b\r', true)). (2) Async read loop: for(;;) { line = await rl.read(PROMPT); await doEval(line); } catch re-prompts. (3) Tab completions via (rl as RlInternal).state?.buffer()/.update(text). (4) Multiple completions apply LCP to avoid layout corruption from writing above readline prompt.

title: xterm-readline over local-echo
rationale: local-echo uses term.on() (xterm v3/v4 API), incompatible with @xterm/xterm v5. xterm-readline@1.1.2 uses @xterm/xterm ^5.5.0 peer dep, has setHighlighter/setCheckHandler/setCtrlCHandler, built-in history with localStorage. Applied in behavior-tree-ist-8c46.
